phase_history.notes: Defined Nova Master as a premium final mix processor focused on polish, glue, clarity, weight, width, and finish with a simple five-knob workflow.
Planned a mastering-style chain combining tonal balance, glue compression, harmonic finish, stereo polish, and output control using a WebView-based flagship Nova UI.
Created the first Nova Master visual direction with five central mastering controls, Clean/Warm/Wide/Loud modes, a premium Finish button, and elevated platinum-champagne styling.

Implemented the buildable JUCE/WebView Nova Master plugin with real parameter binding, tonal shaping, glue compression, width polish, and a hidden smart loudness limiter tied to FINISH; verified successfully through the repository build script.

Created the Linux release-prep package at dist/NovaMaster_v0.0.0_linux and dist/NovaMaster_v0.0.0_linux.zip, included end-user documentation, and verified a headless standalone smoke launch passed after the final build.

framework_selection.rationale: WebView is the best fit for Nova Master because it should feel like the flagship finishing plugin in the Nova suite, with a refined mastering-room presentation, polished meter animation, and elegant interactive controls.
